creator: kfv@kfv.io
text:
I know you better than you may imagine, Abdorrahman. I know what you have done and what your biggest concerns are.
The ending answer of mine to you is that to whomever your can lie, I am not included and you are surely just losing your reputation and respect.
I have reports of all attacks you have attempted and I also know about your background and records and in the case of defence I will not stay silent.
So do your own job and stop baffling others or falsifying me.
I am sorry for you.

End of discussion, no matter what further allegations you make!
